programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles the heat to stay on scent and close the gap.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a vehicle search, uncovering a laundry list of charges.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Every search has a conclusion: whether it's finding a missing person or chasing a suspect on the run, a police K9 makes sure it ends with answers; K9 Pandora wastes no time bringing relief to a desperate family looking for a family member; K9s Jet and Cheney tag-team a fugitive who tears up the roadway and refuses to stop; K9 Karma shuts down a belligerent man fighting arrest; and K-9 Endo follows the scent straight to a dumpster.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Berkeley County South Carolina officers go the extra mile in a high-speed chase. K9 patrol in Wilmington, North Carolina, use their dogs to sniff out a carload of potential contraband. Officers in Citrus County, Florida, track down a stolen vehicle used for suspicious activity.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out a woman accused of double murder.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a vehicle search, uncovering a laundry list of charges.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Every search has a conclusion: whether it's finding a missing person or chasing a suspect on the run, a police K9 makes sure it ends with answers; K9 Pandora wastes no time bringing relief to a desperate family looking for a family member; K9s Jet and Cheney tag-team a fugitive who tears up the roadway and refuses to stop; K9 Karma shuts down a belligerent man fighting arrest; and K-9 Endo follows the scent straight to a dumpster.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Berkeley County South Carolina officers go the extra mile in a high-speed chase. K9 patrol in Wilmington, North Carolina, use their dogs to sniff out a carload of potential contraband. Officers in Citrus County, Florida, track down a stolen vehicle used for suspicious activity.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out a woman accused of double murder.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.sub-title: The Surgeon, the Witch, and the Wardrobe
programme.desc: The buyers nab lockers as a tornado approaches; two bidders band together in the name of profit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Fort Worth, a perilous place in the 1800s, is a host to one more showdown when Matt moseys in and pushes his weight around.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi is determined to actually win a locker for once in Santa Ana and has to show restraint to do it; Rene spots a stack of items in a locker that speaks to him; Kenny puts his needs out to the universe; Barry struggles to stay in the game.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell suffers from bidder indecision; Barry's good-luck charm yields a reward; Jarrod and Brandi win big by going small.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Way of the Gam Gam
programme.desc: While in Santa Ana, Lisa channels her grandmother, in trying to turn a profit; Brandi is dealing with the most frustrating day ever; Darrell tries to make a meal out of a snack-sized locker; Kenny learns to prep himself for true stealthiness.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa comes to Montebello with a clear mind, intent on letting the lockers speak to her; Ivy lets his son navigate his way to a unit which turns out not to be completely vacant; Kenny is absolutely appalled by what he finds abandoned in his unit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary's unit brings out her inner voice; Kenny attempts to clothe America; Brandi and Jarrod get a leg up on the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: New buyers make their debut at the oldest facility in Los Angeles; Brandi and Jarrod try to piece their way to a win; Ivy attempts to hoard most of the units for himself.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: When a beloved son and brother is murdered just feet from his home, his grieving family has one burning question: why?; it's up to a determined team of Gwinnett County investigators and the prosecutor to get their defiant suspect to talk.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: The latest in a string of brazen robberies leaves a beloved, retired sheriff's deputy brutally gunned down, and a survivor of the assault terrified.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: When two beloved brothers are gunned down in their home, their devastated mother leads Gwinnett detectives to a suspect close to home; but with no clear motive to bolster their case, prosecutors could be in trouble at trial.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Harris County, a woman is found bound by the side of the road; as Sgt. James Dousay works the case, he discovers that he may be looking for a serial killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A crew of robbers guns down an Atlanta father; a detective working her first case suspects that she may be pursuing the wrong suspect.

programme.desc: A deadly home invasion sparks a manhunt for a stranger terrorizing a housing complex in Tulsa, Okla.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old boy is murdered after getting in over his head, detectives hope a Snapchat message can lead them to his killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: After a Tulsa man returns home from jail to find another man with the mother of his children, he is shot and killed in the middle of the street.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a 20-year-old woman is found in her apartment a day after being brutally stabbed over 40 times. In Mobile, dozens of bullets are fired at a busy intersection leaving two men dead in a crashed car.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, when a deadly ambush leaves two teens dead and two others critically injured, Det. Jason White follows leads from Tulsa to Mexico in his pursuit for justice.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: An all-American dad's desire for sex with a 14-year-old triggers a takedown that exposes his deviant double life. Then, creepy social media messages to a schoolgirl reveal a dangerous predator. A police officer plays decoy to lure a predator.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a man is lured into a deadly trap, detectives must turn the tables on the suspects, before they strike again.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, Okla., a late-night meeting spins out of control, leaving a young father dead, his friend critically injured, and their SUV crashed through a child's bedroom.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Police on the ground and in the air pursue suspects as they commit multiple carjackings; officers chase a murder suspect through a crowded big box store; police pursue a convicted felon at speeds over 110 miles an hour.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: The pursuit of a convicted felon ends with a head-on collision with a police cruiser; a shoplifting suspect shoots at police and then sets his own house on fire during a standoff; air and ground units coordinate during a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A man wanted for robbery and carjacking leads sheriff's deputies on a chase through crowded city streets; police get in a foot chase with an attempted murder suspect; a late-night, 145-mile-an-hour highway pursuit; and more.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; deputies race to extract a mother and her daughters from their truck after a fleeing suspect crashes into them; fish and wildlife officers pursue a fugitive attempting to escape by swimming away.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; after a high-speed chase ends with a crash on the highway, the suspect shocks officers by attacking one of the accident victims with a knife.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; a man wanted for carjacking runs out of the road during a high-speed chase; an officer climbs on the hood of a car while trying to prevent a fugitive from fleeing.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A high-speed chase across three states; a woman pulled over for speeding flees the scene but still manages to obey traffic laws; suspected auto thieves flee a hit-and-run to hide on a golf course.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: An accused car thief jumps off a 36-foot bridge to avoid capture; an armed fugitive on the run breaks into a building full of law school students; a DUI suspect flees by car, foot, and water before deputies capture him.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a Houston cop seeks access to a mom's two kids, detectives go all in to stop one of their own; detectives team up to catch a predator with his pants down; two brave victims help Det. Godwin to expose a stepdad's horrific secret.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a predator with a disturbing past targets a minor, law enforcement agencies team up for a high-stakes takedown at a busy airport; then, a mom uncovers a predator's twisted scheme; detectives unmask one of their boldest predators yet.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a teacher's deviant messages to a minor surface, Detective Godwin pushes to uncover the extent of his crimes; a predator's warped idea of love triggers a dramatic takedown; detectives snare a predator who wants both boys and girls.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A naked woman is arrested for stealing a sheriff's pickup truck; a gym goer loses his cool and his clothing; and a golf pro spectator streaks into the spotlight.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; in Vegas, a man gets naked on top of a poker table; a mom fires multiple rounds at a police station; a citizen dressed in a poop emoji protests in court; and more!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
